entries.name: export-packager
entries.intent: Package marketplace items as Cowork-compatible plugin ZIPs for distribution to Claude Desktop private marketplaces

entries.name: marketplace-curator
entries.intent: Curate, recommend, and help users discover the right cowork marketplace items for their needs

entries.name: session-orchestrator
entries.intent: Orchestrate cowork sessions by coordinating multiple plugin agents to complete tasks collaboratively
